name: HumbleSwap
description: Decentralized exchange on Voi using constant-product AMM pools. Supports ARC-200 token swaps with automated liquidity provision.

name: Nomadex
description: Decentralized exchange on Voi supporting native VOI swaps directly without wrapping. Uses constant-product AMM model.

name: SnowballSwap
description: DEX aggregator for Voi that routes swaps across HumbleSwap and Nomadex pools for optimal pricing. Supports multi-hop routing.

name: enVoi
description: Decentralized naming service for Voi. Maps human-readable .voi names to wallet addresses with profile metadata (bio, avatar, social links).

name: Nautilus
description: NFT marketplace and asset verification platform on Voi. Supports ARC-72 NFT listings, sales, and collection management.

name: HighForge
description: NFT minting and creation platform on Voi. Enables artists and creators to mint ARC-72 NFT collections.

name: Aramid Bridge
description: Cross-chain bridge connecting Voi to Algorand and other AVM/EVM networks. Enables bridging of native tokens and ASAs between chains.

name: Kibisis
description: Browser extension wallet for Voi and Algorand. Supports ARC-200 tokens, ARC-72 NFTs, and WalletConnect.

name: Voi Network
description: Layer 1 AVM-compatible blockchain focused on community ownership and fair token distribution. Uses proof-of-stake consensus.
